title: Shop-ping
description: This is mod that adds stuff useful for Roleplay Shop.
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Shopping/BH_Shopping_header.webp)

![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Shopping/BH_Shopping_description.webp)

Shopping adds a simple cash register for player shops.

Set item prices, manage owners, and sell items using a clean, immersive system - no GUIs, no complex commands.

Perfect for survival, SMP, and roleplay servers.

***

[![Discord](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Shopping/BH_Shopping_discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/2T6cE5UCws)
